name: credential-link-generator
title: Credential Link Generator
description: Generates a secure onboarding link for up to 5 apps, an enquiry ID, and a contact email.
author: tyler_barsby

preferences.name: workerUrl
preferences.title: API URL
preferences.description: The URL of your Cloudflare Worker, e.g. https://credential-link-proxy.your-subdomain.workers.dev

commands.name: generate-link
commands.title: Generate Link
commands.description: Generate a secure onboarding link with apps, enquiry ID, and email.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
